title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Future Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Future Retail
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
